response.original_title: What Fees Does Uphold Charge? 💰🔐 {FAQs Support}
response.overview: What Fees Does Uphold Charge? 💰🔐 {FAQs Support}  Many users ask, “What fees does Uphold charge?” ✔️ 1⚝(888)⚝(574)⚝(7167) Uphold does not use just one fixed fee. Instead, it charges different types of fees depending on deposits, withdrawals, and trading activity ✔️ 1⚝(888)⚝(574)⚝(7167). Most costs come from a trading spread, payment method fees, and network fees rather than a single flat commission 💳 1⚝(888)⚝(574)⚝(7167).  Main Types of Uphold Fees ⚙️ 1️⃣ Trading Fees (Buy/Sell Crypto) 🔄  Uphold charges a spread-based fee when you trade assets:  What fees does Uphold charge? Uphold charges fees through trading spreads, ✔️ 1⚝(888)⚝(574)⚝(7167) deposit fees (up to ~3.99% for cards), and withdrawal or network fees depending on the method. Some bank transfers are free, while crypto trades include a built-in spread cost ✔️
